info.title: Registrations
info.description: Our Registrations app lets your congregation register and pay for classes, camps, and other events.

tags.name: Campus
tags.description: A `Campus` is a location belonging to an Organization.

tags.name: Category
tags.description: A `Category` is a label used to group together and find signups more easily.

tags.name: Signup
tags.description: A `Signup` is an organization signup that people can register for.

pagination_per_page_parameter.name: per_page
pagination_per_page_parameter.description: Maximum number of records per page

attendee_attributes.description: An `Attendee` is a person registered for a signup.

active.description: Whether or not the attendee is active.

canceled.description: Whether or not the attendee is canceled.

complete.description:
Whether or not attendee has completed all necessary items (personal information, questions, forms, add ons).


Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

waitlisted.description: Whether or not the attendee is waitlisted.

waitlisted_at.description: UTC time at which the attendee was waitlisted.

attendee_attributes.title: Attendee

campus_attributes.description: A `Campus` is a location belonging to an Organization.

city.description: City where the campus is located.

country.description: Country where the campus is located.

state.description: State or province where the campus is located.

campus_attributes.title: Campus

category_attributes.description: A `Category` is a label used to group together and find signups more easily.
category_attributes.title: Category

emergencycontact_attributes.description: `Emergency_Contact` is the person assigned as the emergency contact for an attendee.

phone_number.description: Phone number of the emergency contact person.

emergencycontact_attributes.title: EmergencyContact

organization_attributes.description: The root level `Organization` record which serves as a link to `Signup`s.
organization_attributes.title: Organization

selectiontype_attributes.description: `Selection_Types` are used to present the options people register for in a signup.

price_cents.description: Price of selection type in cents.

price_currency.description:
Signup currency code, example `"USD"`.


Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

price_currency_symbol.description:
Signup currency symbol, example `"$"`.


Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

price_formatted.description:
Price of selection type with currency formatting (symbol not included).


Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

publicly_available.description: Whether or not the selection type is available to the public.

selectiontype_attributes.title: SelectionType

signup_attributes.description: A `Signup` is an organization signup that people can register for.

archived.description: Whether the signup is archived or not.

close_at.description: UTC time at which regsitration closes.

logo_url.description: URL for the image used for the signup.

new_registration_url.description: URL to allow people to register for signup.

open_at.description: UTC time at which regsitration opens.

signup_attributes.title: Signup

signuplocation_attributes.description: `Signup_location` is the location of a signup.

address_data.description:
The address data of the signup location, which includes details like street, city, state, and postal code.


Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

formatted_address.description: The formatted address of the signup location, which may not include subpremise details.

full_formatted_address.description: The fully formatted address of the signup location, including subpremise details.

latitude.description: The latitude of the signup location.

location_type.description: The type of location, such as `address`, `coords`, or `online`.

longitude.description: The longitude of the signup location.

name.description: The name of the signup location.

subpremise.description: The subpremise of the signup location, such as an building or room number.

url.description: The URL for the signup location, if applicable (e.g., for online events).

signuplocation_attributes.title: SignupLocation

signuptime_attributes.description: `Signup_time`s are associated with a signup, which can have multiple signup times.

all_day.description: Whether or not the signup time is all day.

ends_at.description: End date and time of signup time.

starts_at.description: Start date and time of signup time.

signuptime_attributes.title: SignupTime

scopes.registrations: Required scope for accessing via OAuth 2

personal_access_token.description:
Provide your Personal Access Token Client ID as the HTTP Basic username
and your Secret as the HTTP Basic password.

Example header:
Authorization: Basic BASE64(client_id:secret)"
